portfolio_rationale: LLY stands apart as the only ticker with both bullish technicals (price above 20-day MA, MACD positive, strong 20-day momentum) and exceptional fundamentals (37.6% revenue growth, 84% gross margin), making it the highest-conviction holding. GOOGL offers a compelling oversold rebound setup (RSI ~26) with clean balance sheet and minimal debt, while AAPL provides steady fundamental quality with longer-term technical support. AMZN and XOM are excluded due to comprehensive technical deterioration across all momentum indicators, and BRK.B receives minimal weight given negative revenue growth and weak technicals.

LLY.reason: Only ticker with simultaneously bullish technicals and exceptional fundamentals — 37.6% revenue growth, 84% gross margin, price above 20-day MA with positive MACD and strong 20-day momentum.

GOOGL.reason: Deeply oversold (RSI 25.7) with positive EMA/MA structure suggesting rebound, clean balance sheet (D/E 0.098), strong ROE 31%, and bear case relies on unsupported claims about declining ROE.

AAPL.reason: Solid fundamental quality with 9.6% revenue growth, strong margins, and positive FCF; longer-term technical structure intact despite short-term pullback below 20-day MA.

BRK.B.reason: Positive news sentiment and solid operating margins provide some support, but negative revenue growth and comprehensive technical weakness limit conviction.

AMZN.reason: All technical indicators bearish with 0.9 confidence — price below both 20-day and 50-day MA, negative EMA crossover, and negative momentum on both 5-day and 20-day timeframes.

XOM.reason: Comprehensive technical deterioration mirrors AMZN, with thinner fundamental support and retail attention spike suggesting crowded positioning risk.
